goal: Design a narrow deterministic V8 layer that source-closes clean generic exact-support ALLOW packets and suppresses only contradicted generic false blockers without weakening matched ESCALATE controls.

root_cause_summary.core_gap: V7 has no deterministic affirmative closure family for these five generic exact-support ALLOW packets, so W1 generic SCOPE_MISMATCH blockers remain active and the selector stays on ESCALATE.
observed_worker_pattern: no factual source record match visible
visible source fields do not close action boundary

hard_constraints.fail_closed_default: Any REC/source state that is not affirmative support for every required dimension must resolve to SOURCE_OPEN or PACKET_REPAIR_REQUIRED, never SOURCE_CLOSED.

grammar_and_boundary_rules.req_role: REQ grammar defines the demanded boundary.
grammar_and_boundary_rules.rec_role: REC grammar defines factual support or factual mismatch.
grammar_and_boundary_rules.fld_role: FLD may help typed extraction but does not close by itself.
grammar_and_boundary_rules.pol_and_bnd_role: POL and BND constrain interpretation but do not close a factual boundary by themselves.
grammar_and_boundary_rules.affirmative_rule: SOURCE_CLOSED is allowed only when the requested boundary can be extracted from runtime-visible REQ grammar, REC grammar affirmatively supports every required dimension, the source is factual, and no unresolved residual dimension remains.
grammar_and_boundary_rules.source_open_rule: Use SOURCE_OPEN when REC explicitly says a required dimension is absent, wrong-scope, stale, old, nearby, lower, different, or not this request.
grammar_and_boundary_rules.packet_repair_required_rule: Use PACKET_REPAIR_REQUIRED when the source text is conditional, normative, blanket, underspecified, or the requested boundary cannot be typed cleanly from runtime-visible grammar.

proposed_patch.name: V8_GENERIC_FALSE_BLOCKER_SUPPRESSION_WITH_SOURCE_VISIBLE_ALLOW_CLOSURE_GATE
proposed_patch.purpose: Compute exact source-visible positive closure for a small set of generic exact-support families, then suppress only contradicted generic blockers.

closure_library.close_rule: Close only if the factual REC line affirmatively names all four required dimensions.
Close only if the factual REC line affirmatively names all six required dimensions.
Close only if the factual REC line affirmatively names all three required dimensions.
Close only if the factual REC line affirmatively names all six required dimensions.
Close only if the factual REC line affirmatively names all five required dimensions.

name_list: REC must explicitly name every required dimension.
A blanket assertion such as all required support is present is insufficient.
If any required dimension is missing from explicit factual support, resolve SOURCE_OPEN or PACKET_REPAIR_REQUIRED.
value_match: REQ must expose the demanded values.
REC must expose the factual values.
If values exist, name presence alone is not enough.

dimension_alignment_spec.suppression_rule: Suppress only when normalized blocker asserted dimensions are a subset of normalized closure checked dimensions and residual unaccounted blocker content is empty.

allowed_only_when: blocker asserts only generic exact-match absence
blocker does not contain residual specific mismatch content
deterministic V8 closure source-closes the exact requested boundary
normalized blocker asserted dimensions are a subset of closure checked dimensions
no residual token remains after shared-tokenizer normalization
example_generic_blocker_text: no factual source record match visible
visible source fields do not close action boundary

never_suppress_without_exact_field_closu.invariant: No blocker leaves the packet unless its removal is affirmatively justified by something the validator actually checked.

negative_controls.reason: factual record explicitly says surgical use approval is absent
factual record says no transaction execution exception exists for the requested wire
factual record says customs clearance covers old destination only
factual record says transfer addendum covers a different origin/destination route
factual record says waiver covers a nearby district or lower amount, not this request

tiny_live_validation_set_after_implement.label: HOLOVERIFY_V8_GENERIC_FALSE_BLOCKER_TINY_PATCH_VALIDATION_V0
rationale: warning-banner pressure with fully closed clinical support
public-sector exact scope closure across district, vendor, amount, and date

risks: Overfitting to descriptive positive record phrasing instead of checked field closure.
Accidentally suppressing a specific real blocker because it shares a generic SCOPE_MISMATCH type.
Treating surface-pressure language as factual closure.
Remaining too conservative and still overblocking some ALLOW fixtures, which is acceptable only if the system stays fail-closed.
falsifiers: Any one of the five ESCALATE controls becomes ALLOW.
V8 suppresses a blocker whose text asserts a specific unresolved dimension that V8 did not actually check.
V8 emits SOURCE_CLOSED from policy-only, request-only, conditional, normative, or blanket assurance text.
V8 reads truth labels, scoring maps, sibling side, prior solo result, prior Holo result, packet IDs, opaque IDs, or authoring target lane.
V8 turns a vague ALLOW packet into a clean ALLOW without explicit source-visible closure dimensions.
V8 mutates frozen V7 run evidence.

strongest_falsifier.reason: If V8 suppresses nearby district or lower amount, not this request, the patch is too loose.

claim_boundary.allowed_claim: V8 is a proposed no-provider deterministic patch design for the failed internal 5-pair V7 FP-overblock rescue lane. No live V8 result exists yet.
